issues.description: DSL is missing the [On Play] trash action. Card text states 'Draw 2 cards and trash 2 cards from your hand' but only DrawCard is present. TrashFromHand action with count:2 is required.
DSL completely omits the [Blocker] ability. Card has an intrinsic Blocker mechanic that should be represented, though this may be a keyword/mechanic tracked separately depending on system design.
